script_system_append: For this campaign, cast a dignified clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size Western elderly rider and preserve the same heavier senior body type across all scenes. Avoid hospital, rehab, or caregiver stereotypes unless explicitly requested.
script_user_append: Keep all scenes on one coherent Western home-to-outdoor route, such as porch -> ramp -> backyard path -> quiet neighborhood or woodland edge. Do not jump to unrelated places.
